meaning: verb. To give up or relinquish control of, to surrender or to give oneself over, or to yield to one's emotions.; To desist in doing, practicing, following, holding, or adhering to; to turn away from; to permit to lapse; to renounce; to discontinue.
noun. Suitableness.; The quality or state of being able; capacity to do or of doing something; having the necessary power.
adjective. Easy to use.; Suitable; competent.
